creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I just committed an updated variation of your patch; thanks for bringing 
this to my attention!  (This transitively adds another two ports on top, 
p5-XML-NamespaceSupport and p5-XML-SAX, so it's not exactly cheap, and I 
am considering making this into an option possibly.)
